summary: Observed Explorer runtime setting for folder and desktop item info tips. Microsoft Open Specifications documents ShowInfoTip under Explorer\Advanced with 1 = enable and 0 = disable, the 25H2 default hive exports the same value as 1, and a reversible Win25H2Clean Procmon capture on 2026-03-24 confirmed that Explorer.EXE queries HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowInfoTip with both Data:0 and Data:1 after Explorer restart.

setting.name: Show Explorer Info Tips
setting.casual_explanation: File Explorer can show or suppress pop-up descriptions for folder and desktop items when you hover them.
setting.why_people_change_it: People change this when they want less hover noise in Explorer or when they rely on the extra item descriptions during file browsing.
setting.tradeoffs_overview: This is a low-risk Explorer preference. Enabling info tips provides more context in hover pop-ups, while disabling them reduces visual noise.
setting.professional_notes: Microsoft Open Specifications maps the showInfoTip folder option to HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowInfoTip and defines 1 as enabled and 0 as disabled. The 25H2 default hive exports ShowInfoTip = 1 in the Explorer\Advanced block. A reversible Win25H2Clean Procmon probe on 2026-03-24 then confirmed live Explorer consumption: after writing ShowInfoTip = 0 and restarting Explorer, Explorer.EXE queried the value with Data: 0; after writing ShowInfoTip = 1 and restarting Explorer, Explorer.EXE queried the same value with Data: 1. This closes the loop between the documented semantics, the 25H2 default-hive corroboration, and the live runtime surface.

allowed_values.label: Hide Explorer info tips
allowed_values.meaning: Explorer info-tip pop-ups are disabled. Microsoft documents 0 as the disabled state, and the Win25H2Clean Procmon capture shows Explorer.EXE querying Data: 0 after restart.

allowed_values.label: Show Explorer info tips
allowed_values.meaning: Explorer info-tip pop-ups are enabled. Microsoft documents 1 as the enabled state, the 25H2 default hive exports ShowInfoTip = 1, and the Win25H2Clean Procmon capture shows Explorer.EXE querying Data: 1 after restart.

targets.notes: This record validates the documented 0/1 semantics against the live Explorer runtime surface on Win25H2Clean.

app_current_implementation.notes: The app does not currently expose ShowInfoTip.

windows_defaults.label: 25H2 default Explorer preference
windows_defaults.applies_to: Current-user Explorer Advanced settings on the 25H2 default hive snapshot

states.rationale: HKCU25H2.reg exports ShowInfoTip = 1 in the default Explorer\Advanced block.

windows_defaults.notes: This is current 25H2 default-hive corroboration rather than a guarantee for every historical build.

recommended_profiles.label: Show Explorer info tips
intended_for: Users who want more hover context in Explorer
Users who rely on folder and desktop item descriptions
avoid_for: Users who prefer a quieter Explorer UI

states.rationale: This matches the documented enabled state and the 25H2 default-hive export.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You want Explorer to show item info tips on hover.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You want to reduce hover pop-ups and visual noise.
tradeoffs: Adds item descriptions in Explorer hover pop-ups.
Can make the UI feel busier.

recommended_profiles.label: Hide Explorer info tips
intended_for: Users who prefer a quieter Explorer UI
avoid_for: Users who depend on hover descriptions

states.rationale: This matches the documented disabled state and the runtime-observed Explorer read.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You want Explorer to suppress info-tip pop-ups.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You rely on the extra hover descriptions while browsing files.
tradeoffs: Removes item descriptions from the hover UI.

evidence.title: Microsoft Open Specifications: GlobalFolderOptionsVista showInfoTip
evidence.summary: Microsoft maps showInfoTip to HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowInfoTip and states that it MUST be 1 to enable or 0 to disable. The description says the option shows pop-up descriptions for folder and desktop items.

evidence.title: 25H2 default hive corroboration for ShowInfoTip
evidence.summary: The 25H2 default hive exports ShowInfoTip = 1 under HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced.

evidence.title: Procmon capture - Explorer ShowInfoTip runtime surface
evidence.summary: A reversible Win25H2Clean Procmon capture on 2026-03-24 wrote ShowInfoTip = 0 and ShowInfoTip = 1, restarted Explorer after each write, and captured Explorer.EXE querying HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowInfoTip with matching Data: 0 and Data: 1 values.

decision.why: Microsoft documents the 0/1 semantics, the 25H2 default hive corroborates the current default state, and the Win25H2Clean Procmon trace confirms live Explorer consumption of both states on this build. This is a low-risk user-scope Explorer preference.

open_questions: Should the app expose ShowInfoTip as a general Explorer preference?

validation_proof.exact_quote_or_path: STATE=0 ... Explorer.EXE RegQueryValue HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowInfoTip ... Data: 0; STATE=1 ... Explorer.EXE RegQueryValue HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowInfoTip ... Data: 1; RESTORED_VALUE=1
validation_proof.notes: Raw hit exports were also copied to H:\Temp\vm-tooling-staging\showinfotip-0-hits.csv and H:\Temp\vm-tooling-staging\showinfotip-1-hits.csv.
